history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell (2, B) facing right. The cell directly ahead (2, C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to eventually reach the goal at (8, H). Turning right will make me face down, allowing me to move into the safe cell (3, B). This is the first step of the planned path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (2, B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3, B) is floor, so it's safe to move forward. Continuing down along column B will lead me to row 6, where I can then turn right and move across to column G, then down to the goal at (8, H). So the immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (3, B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (4, B) is floor, so it's safe. I need to keep moving down to reach row 6 where I can turn right. Continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (4, B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (5, B) is floor, so it's safe. I need to keep moving down to row 6 to eventually turn right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (5, B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (6, B) is floor, so it's safe. I'll continue moving down toward row 6 to then turn right and head east toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6, B) facing down. The cell ahead (7, B) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go east toward the goal. Turning left from down will make me face right. Then I can move east along row 6, avoiding the lava below.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, B) facing right. The cell ahead (6, C) is floor, so I can move forward safely. I'll continue moving east along row 6 to eventually reach column G, then go down to row 7 and row 8 to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, C) facing right. Cell (6, D) is floor, so I can move forward safely. I'll keep moving east.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, D) facing right. Cell (6, E) is floor, so I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, E) facing right. Cell (6, F) is floor, so I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, F) facing right. The cell directly ahead at (6, G) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. I will continue moving right to reach column G, then later turn down to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, G) facing right. The cell ahead at (6, H) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. This brings me closer to the goal which is at (8, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, H) facing right. The cell ahead (6, I) is a wall, and the cells above (5, H) and below (7, H) are lava. The only safe adjacent cell is to the left (6, G), but I need to turn around to face left. Turning right will make me face down, and then turning right again will make me face left. I will start by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, H) facing down (v). Directly below is lava (L) at (7, H), so I cannot move forward. I need to go left to (6, G) which is safe floor. To face left, I need to turn clockwise (TURN_RIGHT) from facing down. Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, H) facing left. Moving forward will take me to (6, G), which is safe floor. From there I can later turn downward and navigate around the lava to reach the goal at (8, H).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, G) facing left. I need to go down to (7, G) and then to (8, G) and finally right to (8, H) goal. To face down, I should turn left (counter-clockwise) from left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, G) facing down. Moving forward will take me to (7, G), which is safe floor (not lava, not wall). From there I'll need to move down again to (8, G) and then right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, G) facing down. The cell directly below (8, G) is floor (safe), so I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8, G) facing down. The goal is at (8, H), one cell to the right. To move right, I need to face right. Turning left (counter-clockwise) from facing down will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (8, G) facing right. The goal is directly ahead at (8, H). I will move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
